---
title: "<i>Sharpe’s Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>Sharpe’s Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

<i>Sharpe’s London Magazine of Entertainment and Instruction </i>ran 1846-1870.  Menella Bute Smedley and her cousin Frank Smedley both wrote for it, and the latter was briefly its editor.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
